title: Primrose Path
writer: Allan Scott, Gregory La Cava, Robert L. Buckner
actors: Ginger Rogers, Joel McCrea, Marjorie Rambeau
plot: A young woman from a family of prostitutes falls in love with a hard-working man, but after he finds out the truth about her background, their romance becomes jeopardized.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 4 wins & 1 nomination total
